---
title: "Assignment 10B: NobelPrize.org"
author: "Emily El Mouaquite"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Approach

For this assignment, I will perform an analysis/ investigation of Nobel Prize JSON data through the following four questions:

1. How many laureates have won prizes in association with an organization that is headquartered in a different country than the one that they are from?

2. Who are the top 10 laureates with the most awards?

3. What gender is most represented in each prize category?

4. Do Nobel Prize categories differ in how the prize money changes over time across decades?
